narrative:
Precinct New Phila 1-D (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 464 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.8 percentage points.
